channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Astronomers found two rare super puff planets lighter than cotton candy
item.description: Two newly confirmed "super-puff" planets are so diffuse that they are less dense than cotton candy, despite being about the size of Jupiter. Their rar...

item.title: Scientists discover what triggers belly fat as we age
item.description: Aging may trigger the appearance of specialized stem cells that supercharge the body's ability to create new belly fat. The discovery reveals a potent...

item.title: Butter and margarine appear similar, but their chemistry differs greatly
item.description: The butter vs. margarine debate hinges on chemistry. Butter's natural fats produce rich flavors, golden browning, and flaky texture.

item.title: Podcast: Brain-computer interface controls exoskeleton
item.description: Payam Heydari discusses a breakthrough brain-computer interface that controls a robotic exoskeleton, a technology that could transform lives.
